title: Nifty Navigation
description: Allows you to dye maps and compasses
body:
# Nifty Navigation  
Allows you to dye maps and compasses, so you can more easily tell them apart at a glance.
## Recommendations
- Reduce the glint strength in accessibility settings so that the dyed color is more visible on lodestone compasses
